input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.5.3
            TITLE: flammable liquid and vapors or other leaks must not collect or contact the driver

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.5.3: Flammable liquid and vapors or other leaks must not collect or contact the driver
T.5.5.3 Flammable liquid and vapors or other leaks must not collect or contact the driver

final_answer: Flammable liquid and vapors or other leaks must not collect or contact the driver
